response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 - 加藤あやの
response.overview: Why couldn't I firmly refuse at that time? Five years into my marriage with my wife, Ayano, I was working as a magazine editor, entrusted with projects with the renowned photographer, Mr. Oshima. During a meeting one day, Mr. Oshima said, "I'm tired of professional models. I want to photograph amateurs like your wife." That night, I told my wife about Mr. Oshima's proposal, and she agreed to participate in the shoot just once. On the day of the shoot, the intense photoshoot between my wife and the male model began. I thought I just had to endure it for that one day... but after the shoot, Mr. Oshima said he wanted to do a nude photoshoot with my wife as the model.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Ayano Kato
